title: Distribution Manager Vacancy at Dunzo Logistics - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Distribution Manager Vacancy at Dunzo Logistics - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Dunzo Logistics! We are hiring a Distribution Manager for our Patna team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Dunzo Logistics:
Dunzo Logistics is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage a fleet of vehicles and coordinate with drivers
• Prepare MIS reports on delivery performance and SLA adherence
• Ensure compliance with transportation regulations and safety standards
• Coordinate with customer service teams to resolve delivery issues
• Manage relationships with third-party logistics providers
• Conduct periodic vendor audits and evaluate logistics partners
• Oversee end-to-end logistics operations for timely delivery

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in SAP SCM
• Proficiency in 3PL Management
• Proficiency in WMS
• Proficiency in Last Mile Delivery
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Customs Clearance
• Proficiency in TMS
• Proficiency in Route Optimization

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Annual performance appraisal
• Professional development and training programs
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Patna, Bihar, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Dunzo Logistics!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
